data.current_description: Capture a high-quality website screenshot with customizable options.
data.summary_suggestion: Capture a website screenshot with custom options
data.description_suggestion: Generates a screenshot of a specified website URL with customizable rendering options. Accepts parameters for viewport dimensions, image format, quality settings, and other rendering preferences. Returns a ScreenshotResponse object containing the generated screenshot data.
